title: OP Warden Loot
description: Adds loot obtained by killing the Warden
body:
# | DESCRIPTION | Adds new loot to the Warden's loot table. It will drop on death. Loot includes a custom item. - 2 of: any "special" sculk block (Not vein or sculk block) 42% OR 2-4 Sculk Vein orSculk 57% - 1-2 Echo Shard 50% OR 2-4 Disc Fragment 50% - 1 Warden's Blade 10% on player kill only (Completely ignores armor. As this can one shot players in full protection 4 netherite* in vanilla (with strength, sharpness, crit), you may want to have custom armor or health or some way of surviving. Uses the Warden's sonic boom attack for its hit damage (NOT a custom attack, just a normal sword swing), so it will use that death message on kill.)
\*Will only ignore protection in 1.21.11. Before that, I use Breach 100. This also makes it impossible to add other enchantments in 1.21-1.21.10. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with packs that use the same loot table, ```minecraft:entities/warden```. This includes other drop/boss drop packs and mods. Whatever pack is above the other in the list will use its loot table. **Use with other mods that nerf the sword's damage in some way if in multiplayer.** ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
